title: FoodCreft
description: adds vanilla like food to Minecraft without needing a resource pack or mod.
body:
# FoodCreft

Custom Craftable Food & Drinks for Paper 1.21.11

FoodCreft adds dozens of custom head-based foods & drinks to your Minecraft server — complete with crafting recipes, potion effects, and a clean in-game GUI to browse everything.

Designed for SMP servers that want more variety, roleplay, and visual food items without installing mods.

---

## ✨ Features

* 🥞 80+ Custom Food & Drink Items
* 🧁 Head-based custom models (no resource pack required)
* 📖 `/foodcreft` GUI to browse all craftable foods
* 🛠 Crafting-table style recipe viewer
* ⚡ Lightweight & optimized for Paper 1.21.11

---

## 🧑‍🍳 How It Works

Players can:

1. Run `/foodcreft`
2. Browse all available craftable foods
3. Click an item to view its crafting recipe
4. Craft it normally in a crafting table
5. Right-click the item to consume it

---

## 🖥 Requirements

* Paper 1.21.11
* Java 21

No dependencies required.

---

## 🛠 Commands

| Command      | Description                    |
| ------------ | ------------------------------ |
| `/foodcreft` | Opens the craftable foods menu |
| `/foodcreft help` | Show help |
| `/foodcreft give <food> <player>` | Give a food item |
| `/foodcreft reload` | Reload config and recipes |

---

## 🛠 Permissions

| Permission     | Description                    |
| ------------ | ------------------------------ |
| `foodcreft.admin` | Allows reloading FoodCreft and giving foods |



## 🎮 Perfect For

* SMP Servers
* Survival Servers
